description_long: This object is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel. The frame and slide are angular, with a squared-off trigger guard and a textured grip designed for secure handling. The suppressor extends the overall length of the firearm, and the slide features minimal external markings or embellishments. The grip appears to be made of a polymer material, contoured for ergonomic comfort, and the magazine base is flush with the bottom of the grip. The trigger guard is robust and slightly undercut, providing space for a gloved finger. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on functionality and subdued aesthetics.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a cylindrical suppressor, angular frame, and textured ergonomic grip. The design is modern and functional, with minimal markings and a robust trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the handgun, including the suppressor, grip texture, and squared trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the suppressor and the narrow profile of the slide and frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the suppressor, grip, and slide, with minimal visible markings.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip, slide, and the alignment of the suppressor with the barrel.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with a slight palm swell and features a textured, stippled surface for enhanced traction. It appears to be constructed from a matte black polymer, providing both durability and a secure hold. The grip is ergonomically shaped to fit the hand comfortably, with subtle finger grooves and a flat base. No visible logos or embellishments are present, emphasizing a utilitarian design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is squared-off with a robust, thick profile and a slight undercut at the rear for improved finger placement. It is integrated smoothly into the frame, with no visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is practical, offering ample space for gloved use and contributing to the firearm's modern aesthetic.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is extended and fitted with a cylindrical suppressor, giving it a long, straight profile. The suppressor is matte gray and appears to be threaded onto the barrel, with no visible porting or fluting. The exterior is smooth, with no discernible markings or decorative finishes.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no prominent markings, engravings, or inscriptions visible on the slide. The surface is plain and unadorned, contributing to the understated, tactical appearance of the handgun.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, lacking any extension, bevel, or flare. It is simple in design, with no finger rests, logos, or texturing visible, maintaining the overall minimalist aesthetic.
